DTR  |  Listen to a Short Exchange
LSE-HS9-L4-1400P-HSVPA910-CSR-EUR-02 • Grade 9 • HS Visual and Performing Arts: Theatre, Grades 9–10

The Last Panel

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the girl is trying to decide, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from how she describes each scene, and articulate the conclusion that follows about the relationship she is choosing whether to show.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NCAS Pr4a  |  HS VPA Theatre Grades 9–10: Character Relationships in Drama
